productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland Earthkeeper Chukka Casual boot comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear. The Smart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels in this boot offer comfort where it's most needed.UpperPremium full-grain supple leather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleHigh ankle for enhanced comfortMoisture-wicking 100% organic cotton canvas inner lining for ultimate breathable comfortIntertwined lacing system for a snug, customised FitEmbossed branding on the lateral ankle for styleHaul loop to hang shoe from a backpackMidsoleCushioned fabric footbed for all-day comfort and supportOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with lugs in the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
